steps.title: Match the pronoun to barnacles
steps.content: The subject is turtle barnacles, which is plural. The barnacles use secretions to attach the barnacles to a sea turtle shell, so the object refers back to the subject. A plural reflexive pronoun is required.

steps.title: Reject pronoun mismatches
steps.content: Choice A is singular and nonreflexive. Choice C is plural but nonreflexive, so it does not show the barnacles acting on themselves. Choice D is reflexive but singular, disagreeing with the plural subject. The answer is B.
